detail: Implementation goal created after user clarified the target is implementation, not docs-only planning.
Created wt worktree branch impl-burndown-sessions and cherry-picked the source spec/plan commit.
Ran spec-review-swarm lane review; accepted findings applied to spec and plan.
Ran plan-review-swarm lane review; accepted findings applied to plan.
Implementation may begin after reviewed spec/plan checkpoint commit.

Added clap-backed sessions command contract and SQLx read-only sessions --list --format json slice. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_command; cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_list_json_reads_codex_state_metadata_without_prompt_leak; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added SQLx-backed sessions filtering for cwd, worktree, any, exact provider id, interactive, all, and subagents. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added provider=current resolution from CODEX_HOME/codex-router.config.toml or CODEX_HOME/config.toml with actionable missing-config error. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added sessions --list --format table using comfy-table UTF8_FULL over metadata-only SQLx records. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added sessions --last selection and --dry-run launch output for codex --profile codex-router resume <SESSION_ID>. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added injectable sessions runner and fake-runner proof that --last launches the latest matching session without invoking real Codex in tests. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added interactive sessions picker path using inquire::Select with injectable picker proof that selected metadata-only session launches through the fake runner. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Added guard tests for sessions SQLx-only reader and direct dependency contract: inquire/comfy-table allowed, no direct ratatui/dialoguer/crossterm. Proof: cargo test -p codex-router-cli sessions_; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy -p codex-router-cli --lib --tests -- -D warnings.

Built CLI offline and ran actual binary against temp CODEX_HOME/state_5.sqlite fixture. Proof: cargo build -p codex-router-cli --bin codex-router --offline; ./target/debug/codex-router sessions --scope any --source all --list --format table; ./target/debug/codex-router sessions --scope any --source all --last --dry-run. Note: initial cargo run smoke was blocked by external index DNS, then direct binary smoke passed.

Implementation and implementation-review findings are addressed and pushed at 47b238b1762eca8224d966ab05325997845dbafa; PR #3 is open against main. Local proof passed: fmt, clippy, workspace nextest, build, quota smoke, installed-Codex serial, concurrent WebSocket, and soak. Fresh PR state: head matches local HEAD, no comments/reviews/review threads, Workflow lint succeeded, Rust check remains in progress. Goal remains active until Rust check completes green and quiet-poll/final re-fetch passes.
